summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TUDOaqui Payment System (Transferencia Bancaria BAI and Dinheiro/Cash). All payment features working correctly. Backend: 14/15 tests passed (1 skipped due to rate limiting). Frontend: All payment flows verified - Marketplace 'Comprar' button, Restaurantes 'Pagar' button, CheckoutModal with bank info and cash info, Admin Pagamentos tab, and Account 'Meus Pagamentos' section.
critical_code_review_comments: Payment system properly implements BAI bank details (Conta: 20967898310001, IBAN: AO06 0040 0000 0967898310151, SWIFT: BAIPAOLU)
Both payment methods (transferencia, dinheiro) are active; multicaixa correctly marked as inactive
CheckoutModal correctly shows bank info section when transferencia selected
CheckoutModal correctly shows cash info section when dinheiro selected
Admin Pagamentos tab has proper filters (status, metodo) and confirm/reject actions
Account page shows 'Meus Pagamentos' section with payment history
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing

success_rate.backend: 93% (14/15 tests passed, 1 skipped due to rate limiting)

test_credentials.otp_retrieval: su - postgres -c "psql -d tudoaqui -t -A -c \"SELECT codigo FROM otp_codes WHERE telefone='<PHONE>' AND verificado=false ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;\""

backend_endpoints.GET /api/v1/payments/bank-info: Returns BAI bank details correctly - WORKING
backend_endpoints.GET /api/v1/payments/methods: Returns payment methods (transferencia, dinheiro active; multicaixa inactive) - WORKING
backend_endpoints.POST /api/v1/payments: Creates payments with metodo=transferencia and metodo=dinheiro - WORKING

frontend_features.marketplace_comprar_button: Product detail shows 'Comprar' button that opens CheckoutModal - WORKING
frontend_features.restaurantes_pagar_button: Cart shows 'Pagar {total}' button instead of just total - WORKING
frontend_features.checkout_modal_transferencia: Shows bank details (BAI, conta, IBAN, SWIFT, titular, instrucoes) and comprovativo input - WORKING
frontend_features.checkout_modal_dinheiro: Shows cash info with exact amount to prepare - WORKING
frontend_features.admin_pagamentos_tab: Shows stats, filters, payments table with confirm/reject actions - WORKING
frontend_features.account_meus_pagamentos: Shows user's payment history with status badges - WORKING

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test payments during testing (transferencia and dinheiro methods)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment system fully functional. Test users: +244911000001 (Carlos Mendes, organizador) has payments. Admin: +244912000000. Rate limiter active (5 min cooldown for OTP requests). To bypass rate limiter during testing, get OTP from DB after login request.

mocked_apis.sms_provider: Africa's Talking is in SANDBOX mode - OTPs are stored in PostgreSQL otp_codes table instead of being sent via real SMS
